title: tarenna flava
intro: Tarenna flava, also known as golden tarenna, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is widely used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tarenna flava include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Tarenna flava can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
